name: Zinc of Ireland NL
summary: Zinc of Ireland NL operates as a mineral exploration and development company in Ireland. The company explores for zinc, gold, and base metal deposits. Its flagship project is the Kildare project located southwest of Dublin. The company was formerly known as Global Metals Exploration NL and changed its name to Zinc of Ireland NL in July 2016. The company is based in Subiaco, Australia.
